title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Larsen & Toubro Consulting Pvt Ltd!
